atomicity.message: Staged payload is exactly one operating-contract bootstrap unit for land-02: add AGENTS.md with concrete Burpvalve purpose/commands and track CLAUDE.md as a symlink to AGENTS.md.

conditions.message: Applicable lint/style gates were considered for the staged operating-contract payload. The staged files have no diff whitespace errors, no remaining scaffold placeholders, and Burpvalve reports no executable lint commands are currently enforced, so there is no executable lint failure for this slice.
evidence: git diff --cached --name-status -> A AGENTS.md; A CLAUDE.md
git diff --cached --check -> no output, exit 0
git show :AGENTS.md | rg -n "TBD|Replace this" -> no output, exit 1
go run ./cmd/burpvalve lint -> status not_enforced; command_count 0; skipped lint-rules-wishlist because backpressure/manifest.yaml has no exact lint_commands entries
go test ./... -> ok for cmd/burpvalve, internal/backpressure, internal/scaffold, and remaining packages; note this is current-tree evidence, not a stash-isolated staged proof

conditions.message: The staged slice adds one canonical operating-contract document and one symlink to it. I found no duplicated implementation logic, parallel helpers, repeated validation, or copied code blocks requiring extraction.
evidence: git diff --cached --name-status -> A AGENTS.md; A CLAUDE.md
git ls-files --stage AGENTS.md CLAUDE.md -> AGENTS.md mode 100644; CLAUDE.md mode 120000
git show :CLAUDE.md -> AGENTS.md
git diff --cached --stat -> AGENTS.md 164 insertions; CLAUDE.md 1 insertion

conditions.message: The staged operating contract replaces placeholder language with concrete project purpose and commands, and it preserves explicit rules against self-certification. I did not find fake completion language or a shortcut that weakens the real backpressure goal.
evidence: git show :AGENTS.md | rg -n "TBD|Replace this" -> no output, exit 1
git show :AGENTS.md | rg -n "Before committing feature work|Definition Of Done|Relevant checks run|Backpressure verifier" -> lines 48, 50, 52, and 48 show verifier/check requirements
sed -n '1,220p' backpressure/anti-reward-hacking.md -> condition purpose is to prevent superficial success signals, fake completion patterns, and metric gaming

conditions.message: The staged payload adds documentation plus a symlink and does not add or change functions, methods, runtime behavior, or tests. Direct function-level test coverage is therefore not applicable to this staged slice.
evidence: git diff --cached --name-status -> A AGENTS.md; A CLAUDE.md
git diff --cached --summary -- AGENTS.md CLAUDE.md -> create mode 100644 AGENTS.md; create mode 120000 CLAUDE.md
sed -n '1,220p' backpressure/one-function-one-test.md -> condition concerns when new or changed behavior requires direct test coverage

conditions.message: The staged AGENTS.md defines project commands, backpressure verifier requirements, atomic commits, and Definition Of Done bullets. This directly improves the operating contract for what done means in this repo.
evidence: git show :AGENTS.md | rg -n "Build:|Test:|Lint:|Package:|Run locally" -> lines 19-23 list concrete commands
git show :AGENTS.md | rg -n "Definition Of Done|Relevant checks run|complete feature x condition matrix|Files committed|Remaining risks" -> lines 50-55 define done criteria
go test ./... -> all listed packages passed in the current tree

conditions.message: For this operating-contract slice, the staged AGENTS.md requires checks and verifier matrix evidence before completion. This verifier reply supplies command evidence for the commit gate, and no separate persistent evidence-log file is required by the current condition text.
evidence: sed -n '1,220p' backpressure/evidence-log.md -> condition asks what evidence agents must record before closing work
git show :AGENTS.md | rg -n "Relevant checks run and results recorded|complete feature x condition matrix|Remaining risks" -> lines 52-55 require recorded checks and risk notes
Verifier evidence gathered: git diff --cached --name-status, git diff --cached --check, git ls-files --stage, git show :AGENTS.md, go run ./cmd/burpvalve lint, go test ./...

conditions.message: The staged payload is tightly scoped to the requested operating contract and Claude symlink. Broader Phase 0-2 working-tree changes are visible but not staged in this commit slice.
evidence: git diff --cached --name-status -> A AGENTS.md; A CLAUDE.md
git diff --cached --stat -> 2 files changed, 165 insertions
git status --short -- AGENTS.md CLAUDE.md backpressure -> only AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md are staged; backpressure files are untracked and not staged
git show :AGENTS.md | rg -n "One feature, one commit|If staged changes contain multiple atomic units|Uncertainty|File Coordination" -> lines 27, 30, 61, and 65 show scope/coordination controls

conditions.message: The staged slice creates two repo-local documentation/coordination entries and performs no deletes, resets, force pushes, migrations, deploys, external sends, spend changes, or production mutations.
evidence: git diff --cached --summary -- AGENTS.md CLAUDE.md -> create mode 100644 AGENTS.md; create mode 120000 CLAUDE.md
git diff --cached --name-status -> A AGENTS.md; A CLAUDE.md
sed -n '1,220p' backpressure/destructive-operations.md -> condition applies to risky commands and irreversible changes

conditions.message: The staged payload does not alter persisted data formats, migrations, idempotency logic, dedupe behavior, backups, or audit trail code. It only adds the operating contract and symlink.
evidence: git diff --cached --name-status -> A AGENTS.md; A CLAUDE.md
git diff --cached -- AGENTS.md CLAUDE.md -> new AGENTS.md text and CLAUDE.md symlink target only
sed -n '1,220p' backpressure/data-integrity.md -> condition concerns persisted data, migrations, idempotency, dedupe, rollback, backups, and audit trails

conditions.message: The staged slice does not add auth, secrets, tenant isolation, PII handling, permission checks, sandbox logic, or external API behavior. No security boundary is changed by AGENTS.md plus a symlink.

sed -n '1,220p' backpressure/security-boundaries.md -> condition concerns auth, secrets, tenant isolation, PII, permissions, sandbox, and external APIs

conditions.message: The staged payload has no runtime path, benchmark, memory, bundle-size, throughput, token, or cost behavior. Performance-budget checks are not applicable to this documentation/symlink slice.

git diff --cached --stat -> AGENTS.md 164 insertions; CLAUDE.md 1 insertion

conditions.message: The staged operating contract defines agent startup obligations, uncertainty handling, file coordination, NTM boundaries, and verifier/backpressure requirements. That is directly aligned with the autonomy-boundary condition for this payload.
evidence: git show :AGENTS.md | rg -n "Agent Startup|Uncertainty|File Coordination|Before state-changing NTM commands|NTM is an optional top-level coordination bridge|Before committing feature work" -> lines 10, 61, 65, 36, 38, and 48 show autonomy boundaries

git show :AGENTS.md | rg -n "Do not silently replace a hard requirement|Do not revert changes you did not make|explicit human approval|Do not fabricate subagent confirmation" -> lines 63, 67, 38, and 38 show explicit agent limits
sed -n '1,220p' backpressure/autonomy-boundary.md -> condition concerns actions agents may take independently and which require human approval/evidence
